summary: Both REQ-20 and REQ-21 are substantially implemented. REQ-20 is addressed in useQueries.ts with a 5-second timeout mechanism and in App.tsx with fallback to the login screen on timeout/error. REQ-21 is addressed in backend/main.mo by reinitializing stable variables to empty collections and in backend/migration.mo with a migration function that resets all state. All acceptance criteria appear covered.
